sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Khaici manpha vawh un, Sun khua phat
Khaici manpha vawh un, dawm in

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Khaici manpha vawh un, Khaici manpha vawh un,
Nuntak khomun balnen, Lungdamna tangthu gen ta un,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khaici manpha vawh un, ni a kai laitak inah zong,
vawh un, um lah lo-in om un,
A vekpi’n Pasian ap in, Amah muang un.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Khaici manpha vawh un, kham khaici
Pasian in ni le guah, pua ding
